ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* Time when the market opens */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* Time when the market closes */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the market is open */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock data was last updated */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key for SEC filings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES stock_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the stock on that date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "market_weight" REAL /* Weight of the industry in the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "market_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sector in the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock type data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market summary */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the summary belongs to */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date the summary was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the market for that date */,
  "summary_type" TEXT /* Type of summary (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the summary data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_summaries_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the performance belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was calculated */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the stock for that date */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of performance (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "sector_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector performance record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the performance belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was calculated */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the sector for that date */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of performance (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_performance_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
